task_completion.description: Agent selects an image file from the vacation_photos directory to use as a keyfile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A decryption or mounting utility (e.g., VeraCrypt) dialog showing an image file from '/home/ga/Investigation/vacation_photos/' added to the keyfiles list.

task_completion.description: Agent successfully mounts the encrypted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A mounting utility's main window showing '/home/ga/Investigation/design_specs.hc' actively mounted to a drive slot or mount point.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the contents of the successfully mounted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window displaying the internal contents of the mounted volume, with 'prototype_specs.txt' clearly visible.

task_completion.description: Agent extracts the confidential file to the required recovery directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing that 'prototype_specs.txt' now exists inside the '/home/ga/recovered_data/' directory.

task_completion.description: Agent optionally saves the name of the correct keyfile to a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output (e.g., using 'cat') showing the file '/home/ga/recovered_data/keyfile_name.txt' containing the filename of the correct image keyfile.

integrity.description: Verify the volume was genuinely mounted using a cryptographic tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for interaction with actual volume mounting software (like VeraCrypt, zuluCrypt, or cryptsetup in terminal) rather than the agent simply creating a mock folder named after the volume.

integrity.description: Verify the file was copied from the volume, not fabricated.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a copy/paste action or terminal 'cp' command moving the file from the mount point to the recovered_data directory, rather than the agent creating a new empty file named 'prototype_specs.txt'.

integrity.description: Verify the reported keyfile matches the one actually used.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the filename written in 'keyfile_name.txt' is the exact same image file that was selected in the keyfile selection dialog during the mounting step.
